mechanism: Provides high iodine and sulfated polysaccharides (for example fucoidan), which may influence thyroid hormone synthesis and inflammatory pathways.
safetyNotes: Main risk is iodine excess or contamination-related toxicity; avoid in hyperthyroidism and monitor thyroid function with prolonged use.

description: Thyroid stimulant (iodine source), metabolism booster. Herbs often act via neurotransmitter modulation, antioxidant effects, or enzyme inhibition.. None. ; nan; nan.
interactions: Can potentiate thyroid dysfunction when combined with levothyroxine, antithyroid drugs, or excess iodine intake.
May increase bleeding risk when used with anticoagulant or antiplatelet therapy (fucoidan-related concern).
preparation: Whole thallus dried and decocted or powdered; used in tinctures and supplements for thyroid support
